objective: Close F-0176 statically by deriving one strict versioned and minimized learning_suggestion input from the finalized immutable exam_report snapshot, binding it to the exact report revision, supplying the existing Prompt Registry variable contract, and rejecting stale or corrupt facts before Provider execution or persistence.
blockedFiles: any schema, migration, migration apply, real database/data, prompt-template persistence, Provider credential/config/network call, permission, quota, dependency, UI capability, deployment, secret/env, PR, force-push or mechanism change

preRedImpactScan.authoritativeChain: authorized completed exam_report -> immutable report_snapshot plus report_revision -> strict learning_suggestion_input_v1 canonicalizer and digest -> existing learning_suggestion Prompt Registry variable contract -> Provider adapter -> revision-bound snapshot CAS
preRedImpactScan.currentVulnerableSink: retryLearningSuggestion selects one wrong answer or the first row, sends only one full answer/question snapshot plus total score, omits the remaining errors and report analytics, and persists without binding the report revision
preRedImpactScan.securityInvariant: Provider input is derived only from the finalized server-owned report snapshot, contains deterministic bounded aggregates rather than raw answers, exactly fulfills the existing Prompt Registry variables, and cannot persist after report facts change
preRedImpactScan.legitimateBehavior: same finalized report facts produce the same detached canonical input regardless of answer-row order; different weaknesses produce different digest/input; completed legacy-safe reports with valid empty knowledge analytics remain representable
preRedImpactScan.bundleDisposition: F0176_precedes_F0065_because_automating_the_current_single_answer_input_would_amplify_incorrect_semantics; F0065 remains an independent lifecycle residual

requiredSemantics.source: build only from an authorized persisted exam_report whose examStatus is completed, reportRevision is a positive safe integer, and report_snapshot score/status/identity facts exactly match the row; scoring_partial_failed and malformed snapshots fail before Provider
requiredSemantics.contract: one schemaVersion=1 LearningSuggestionInput with strict allowlisted examReport, answerRecordSummary and knowledgeNodeSnapshot variables; reject unknown, missing, sparse, duplicate, case-conflicting, non-finite, unsafe or over-limit facts without trimming/filtering
requiredSemantics.wholeReport: derive deterministic question-type, paper-section, error, missed scoring-point, evidence-status and knowledge-weakness summaries from the entire report snapshot; do not select a single answer row or depend on repository answer-row order
requiredSemantics.minimization: never send selected answers, standard answers, question/answer snapshots, full question text, raw Prompt, raw Provider payload, citations, internal ids or unrelated report fields; only the bounded public identity and analytical facts required for a learning suggestion enter the canonical input
requiredSemantics.determinism: use ordinal case-sensitive uniqueness and ordering, one unambiguous canonical JSON serializer, deep detached output and lowercase SHA-256 digest bound to schemaVersion, reportPublicId and reportRevision
requiredSemantics.prompt: the existing learning_suggestion_v1 registry definition already declares examReport, answerRecordSummary and knowledgeNodeSnapshot; runtime must supply exactly those three variables and validate key/version/hash without changing the registry semantics or inventing a second template
requiredSemantics.provider: the adapter accepts only the canonical input, explicitly serializes the three allowlisted variables for the mock Provider boundary and AI-log redaction, and no longer exposes one answerRecord/question identity as the report-wide invocation lineage
requiredSemantics.persistence: the result snapshot records input schemaVersion/digest/reportRevision and is persisted only by an exact user/report/revision/completed-status CAS; zero or multiple updated rows and concurrent report rebuild are stable fail-closed with no stale suggestion overwrite
requiredSemantics.replay: an already persisted valid suggestion for the same report revision is read-only and triggers no Provider or write; mismatched/corrupt provenance fails closed and is not silently repaired
requiredSemantics.unchanged: F0065 automatic task/failure/retry/UI lifecycle and F0177 usage/latency provenance remain separate; no schema, permission, quota, Provider configuration/network, dependency, report UI/API capability or Cost Calibration work

minimumAdversarialTests: same total score with different knowledge/type/section/error facts yields different canonical input and digest
multiple wrong answers and subjective missed scoring points all participate; no wrong answer, valid empty knowledge and boundary-sized input remain valid
scoring_partial_failed, stale report revision, row/snapshot score or identity mismatch and malformed present analytics fail before Provider and persistence
answer row ordering cannot change input because retry no longer selects or serializes an answer record
unknown/missing/duplicate/case-conflicting/sparse/NaN/Infinity/over-limit values fail closed without partial filtering or truncation
input/output deep-copy mutation isolation and deterministic ordinal ordering/canonical digest
serialized Provider input exposes exactly examReport, answerRecordSummary and knowledgeNodeSnapshot and contains no full raw answer/question/standard answer/citation/internal id
report rebuild during Provider execution makes persistence CAS fail and cannot attach stale suggestion
valid existing same-revision success replay is zero Provider/zero write; mismatched provenance rejects
F0067 report finalization, F0079 knowledge snapshot, prompt registry/provenance, redacted AI log and report UI regressions stay GREEN

validationCommands.name: state-and-source-contract
arguments: validates the F-0176 task state and single production input contract
